title: News
text:
News
Latest updates from FruitMeasureApp, including releases, research progress, and field testing.















First public release of FruitMeasureApp



release



FruitMeasureApp is now available on mobile platforms.





Mar 10, 2026





No matching items

title: About
text:
FruitMeasureApp is a mobile application based on artificial intelligence designed to estimate fruit size directly from smartphone images, supporting decision-making in precision agriculture.



infographic


The project focuses on providing a simple, fast, and reliable tool for measuring fruit diameter in real field conditions.

TODO: Add information supporting the infographic, motivation, and impact of the project. This can include specific examples of how the app can be used in practice, as well as any preliminary results or case studies demonstrating its effectiveness.



FruitMeasureApp is part of a research and demonstration project focused on validating and transferring AI-based tools to the fruit sector.
The main objectives include:

Prototyping and improving the mobile application

Validating and evaluating the technology

Demonstrating real use cases in fruit growing

Supporting technology transfer and dissemination




This project is a collaboration between:

Universitat de Lleida

Institut de Recerca i Tecnologia Agroalimentàries (IRTA)

It is developed within the framework of publicly funded research and innovation programs, including support from:

Generalitat de Catalunya

Ministerio de Agricultura, Pesca y Alimentación

European Union (CAP 2023–2027 framework)


TODO: - Add research group name
- Add principal investigator(s)
- Add official funding program names if needed




FruitMeasureApp is expected to:

Reduce time and labor required for fruit measurement

Improve consistency and reduce human error

Support data-driven decision-making in orchards

Facilitate the transition to digital and precision agriculture


TODO: - Add real-world deployment examples or pilot studies





Active research and development project (2024–2026)

Mobile application published for public use

Includes model inference and training pipelines

title: Credits
text: FruitMeasureApp has been developed by the University of Lleida (UdL) and the Institute of Agrifood Research and Technology (IRTA) within the framework of the demonstrative project FruitMeasureApp: Validació i prototipatge d’una aplicació mòbil basada en IA per mesurar fruits en camp (Activity co-financed by the EU through intervention 7201 of the PAC Strategic Plan 2023-2027).

title: First public release of FruitMeasureApp
text:
We are pleased to announce the first public release of FruitMeasureApp.
This version includes:

Mobile application (Android and iOS)

AI-based fruit detection and measurement

Support for multiple fruits per image

Calibration using a reference marker

title: First public release of FruitMeasureApp
text:
We are pleased to announce the first public release of FruitMeasureApp.
This version includes:

Mobile application (Android and iOS)

AI-based fruit detection and measurement

Support for multiple fruits per image

Calibration using a reference marker

title: First public release of FruitMeasureApp
text:
What’s next
Future updates will focus on:

Improving accuracy

Expanding supported crops

Enhancing usability in field conditions

title: Changelog
text: Development and releases are tracked on GitHub:

title: Changelog
text:
Version 1.0.0

Flutter App
Initial public release of FruitMeasureApp

Mobile application available on Android and iOS

AI-based fruit detection and diameter estimation from images

Support for single and multiple fruit measurements

Integration of reference marker for geometric calibration

Designed for real field conditions



Models

First version of the inference pipeline implemented

Training pipeline available

Support for:

Fruit mode

Corimbe mode

title: Changelog
text:
Notes

This is the first stable version released to the public

Application is available in mobile app stores

Model inference and training pipelines are included in this release
